meta.title: Advanced Embedding Models and Techniques for RAG
meta.description:
➡️ Get Access to the Scripts/Repo: https://Trelis.com/ADVANCED-fine-tuning
➡️ Newsletter: https://Trelis.Substack.com
➡️ Thumbnail made with this tutorial: https://youtu.be/ThKYjTdkyP8

BTW, I should have said this in the video, but ModernBERT is also trained on code! So should be better for that application than previous embedding models!

KEY TRELIS LINKS:
🛠 Tools (Fine-tuning, Vision, Audio, Inference): https://Trelis.com
💡 Consulting (Technical Assistance OR Market Insights): https://forms.gle/2VXzrBzpvm1BmG6e7
🤝 Join the Trelis Team: https://trelis.com/developer-collaborations/
💸 Grants Program: https://trelis.com/trelis-ai-grants/
📧 Newsletter: https://trelis.substack.com

TIMESTAMPS:
00:00:00 - Introduction to advanced video on embedding models for RAG systems
00:00:14 - Introduction to ModernBERT and its improved performance
00:00:20 - Overview of contextual document embeddings
00:01:17 - Explanation of ModernBERT family improvements
00:02:28 - Discussion of ModernBERT's faster runtime and quality metrics
00:03:12 - Explanation of periodic attention layers in ModernBERT
00:03:34 - Discussion of unpacked sequence feeding method
00:04:52 - Introduction to Nomic's fine-tuned ModernBERT model
00:06:15 - Explanation of Matryoshka embeddings for storage optimization
00:07:37 - Discussion of quantization options for memory reduction
00:09:41 - Introduction to contextual document embeddings approach
00:10:43 - Explanation of BM25 and why it works well
00:14:55 - Detailed explanation of contextual document embeddings process
00:19:55 - Presentation of performance results across different models
00:23:28 - Demonstration of creating embeddings with ModernBERT
00:27:50 - Demonstration of CDE model implementation
00:34:24 - Guide to fine-tuning embedding models
00:40:30 - Walkthrough of fine-tuning notebook setup
00:43:43 - Explanation of training process and loss functions
00:48:39 - Summary of tips for implementing embedding models
